trigger_event_kind.description: Kind of event that triggered ingestion

observed_at_utc.description: UTC timestamp when the event was observed

project_root_id.description: Stable identifier for the project root

project_root_path.description: Absolute path of the project root on disk

relative_path.description: Path of the file or directory relative to the project root

depth.description: Number of path segments below the project root

zone.description: Computed governance zone based on depth and exclusions

desired_action.description: High‑level action the ingest engine should perform

context.description: Additional context information passed to the ingest pipeline
